_comment: Codex hooks for telegram-bridge. Installed with `tg.py install codex`, which merges these entries into $CODEX_HOME/hooks.json and replaces __TG_PY__ with the absolute path to scripts/tg.py. The same hook handlers serve Claude Code (hooks/hooks.json) and Codex; Codex's PermissionRequest maps to our notification handler. Codex gates non-managed hooks behind a trust prompt — approve via /hooks on first run.
